chunks.text: Order Sheet IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH KARACHI Cr. B. A. No. 1256 of 2025 Date Order with Signature of Judge For hearing of bail application 03.09.2025 Sardar Salman Ishaque, advocate a/w applicant Raja Hassan Nawaz, advocate for complainant Ms. Rahat Ehsan, APG ---------- Heard arguments. For the reasons to be recorded later on, the applicant has made out a case for pre-arrest bail. Accordingly, ad-interim pre-arrest bail granted to the applicant Abrar son of Asghar Ali, involved in FIR No.115/2025 for the offence punishable under Section 489-F PPC registered at PS Sohrab Goth, Karachi, is hereby confirmed subject to furnishing solvent surety of Rs.200,000/- and PR bonds in the like amount to the satisfaction of Nazir of this Court. J U D G E Ashraf
